en: He made the altar of burnt offering of acacia wood. Five cubits was its length, and five cubits its breadth. It was square, and three cubits was its height.
zh: 他用皂莢木做燔祭壇，長兩公尺兩公寸，寬兩公尺兩公寸，成正方形，高一公尺三公寸。

en: He made horns for it on its four corners. Its horns were of one piece with it, and he overlaid it with bronze.
zh: 在壇的四個拐角做了四隻角，角是與壇連在一起的；又用銅把壇包裹。

en: And he made all the utensils of the altar, the pots, the shovels, the basins, the forks, and the fire pans. He made all its utensils of bronze.
zh: 又做壇上的一切器具，就是盆、鏟、盤、肉叉和火盆；壇上的一切器具都是用銅做的。

en: And he made for the altar a grating, a network of bronze, under its ledge, extending halfway down.
zh: 又替壇做一個銅網，放在壇的圍腰板以下，向下直到壇的半腰。

en: He cast four rings on the four corners of the bronze grating as holders for the poles.
zh: 又鑄造四個環，放在銅網的四端之上，用作抬壇的地方。

en: He made the poles of acacia wood and overlaid them with bronze.
zh: 他用皂莢木做兩根槓，用銅包裹，

en: And he put the poles through the rings on the sides of the altar to carry it with them. He made it hollow, with boards.
zh: 把槓穿在壇兩側的環裡，用來抬壇；壇是用木板做的，是空的。

en: He made the basin of bronze and its stand of bronze, from the mirrors of the ministering women who ministered in the entrance of the tent of meeting.
zh: 他用銅做洗濯盆，又用銅做盆座，是用那些在會幕門口服事的婦女的銅鏡做成的。

en: And he made the court. For the south side the hangings of the court were of fine twined linen, a hundred cubits;
zh: 他又做院子；南面，就是向南的方向，用撚的細麻做院子的幔幕，共四十四公尺。

en: their twenty pillars and their twenty bases were of bronze, but the hooks of the pillars and their fillets were of silver.
zh: 幔幕的柱子有二十根，柱座有二十個，是銅做的；柱鉤和橫柱閂是銀做的。

en: And for the north side there were hangings of a hundred cubits, their twenty pillars, their twenty bases were of bronze, but the hooks of the pillars and their fillets were of silver.
zh: 北面，有幔幕四十四公尺，幔幕的柱子有二十根，柱座有二十個，是銅做的；柱鉤和橫柱閂是銀做的。

en: And for the west side were hangings of fifty cubits, their ten pillars, and their ten bases; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets were of silver.
zh: 西面，有幔幕二十二公尺，幔幕的柱子有十根，柱座有十個；柱鉤和橫柱閂是銀做的。

en: And for the front to the east, fifty cubits.
zh: 東面，就是日出的方向，有幔幕二十二公尺。

en: The hangings for one side of the gate were fifteen cubits, with their three pillars and three bases.
zh: 門口這一邊有幔幕六公尺六公寸；幔幕的柱子有三根，柱座有三個。

en: And so for the other side. On both sides of the gate of the court were hangings of fifteen cubits, with their three pillars and their three bases.
zh: 門口那一邊也是這樣。院子門口的兩邊各有幔幕六公尺六公寸；幔幕的柱子有三根，柱座有三個。

en: All the hangings around the court were of fine twined linen.
zh: 院子周圍的一切幔幕都是用撚的細麻做的。

en: And the bases for the pillars were of bronze, but the hooks of the pillars and their fillets were of silver. The overlaying of their capitals was also of silver, and all the pillars of the court were filleted with silver.
zh: 柱座是銅做的，柱鉤和橫柱閂是銀做的，柱頂是用銀包裹的；院子的一切柱子都是用銀橫閂相連起來。

en: And the screen for the gate of the court was embroidered with needlework in blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen. It was twenty cubits long and five cubits high in its breadth, corresponding to the hangings of the court.
zh: 院子的門簾，是用藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻，以及刺繡的手工做成的；長九公尺，以寬度來說，兩公尺高，與院子的幔幕相配。

en: And their pillars were four in number. Their four bases were of bronze, their hooks of silver, and the overlaying of their capitals and their fillets of silver.
zh: 幔幕的柱子有四根，柱座有四個，是銅做的；柱鉤是銀做的，柱頂和橫柱閂是用銀包裹的。

en: And all the pegs for the tabernacle and for the court all around were of bronze.
zh: 帳幕的一切釘子和院子四周的一切釘子，都是銅做的。

en: These are the records of the tabernacle, the tabernacle of the testimony, as they were recorded at the commandment of Moses, the responsibility of the Levites under the direction of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.
zh: 這是帳幕 內利未人使用的物件的總數，是照著摩西的吩咐，經亞倫祭司的兒子以他瑪的手計算的。

en: Bezalel the son of Uri, son of Hur, of the tribe of Judah, made all that the LORD commanded Moses;
zh: 凡是耶和華吩咐摩西的，猶大支派戶珥的孫子、烏利的兒子比撒列都做了。

en: and with him was Oholiab the son of Ahisamach, of the tribe of Dan, an engraver and designer and embroiderer in blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen.
zh: 與他同工的，有但支派亞希撒抹的兒子亞何利亞伯，是個雕刻匠、圖案設計家，以及能用藍色紫色朱紅色線和細麻刺繡的人。

en: All the gold that was used for the work, in all the construction of the sanctuary, the gold from the offering, was twenty-nine talents and 730 shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary.
zh: 用來建造聖所整個工程使用的一切黃金，就是獻作禮物的金子，按照聖所的標準，共有一千公斤。

en: The silver from those of the congregation who were recorded was a hundred talents and 1,775 shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary:
zh: 會眾中被數點的人所出的銀子，按照聖所的標準，共有三千四百三十公斤。

en: a beka a head (that is, half a shekel, by the shekel of the sanctuary), for everyone who was listed in the records, from twenty years old and upward, for 603,550 men.
zh: 凡是按著次序被數點的人，從二十歲以上的，有六十萬三千五百五十人，按著聖所的標準，每人納銀六克。

en: The hundred talents of silver were for casting the bases of the sanctuary and the bases of the veil; a hundred bases for the hundred talents, a talent a base.
zh: 他用這三千四百公斤銀子鑄造聖所的柱座，和幔子的柱座；一百個柱座用了三千四百公斤銀子，三十四公斤銀子做一個柱座。

en: And of the 1,775 shekels he made hooks for the pillars and overlaid their capitals and made fillets for them.
zh: 他用三十公斤銀子做柱鉤，包裹柱頂，以及為柱頂做橫柱閂。

en: The bronze that was offered was seventy talents and 2,400 shekels;
zh: 獻作禮物的銅有二千四百二十五公斤。

en: with it he made the bases for the entrance of the tent of meeting, the bronze altar and the bronze grating for it and all the utensils of the altar,
zh: 他用這些銅做會幕門口的柱座、銅壇和壇上的銅網，以及壇上的一切器具、

en: the bases around the court, and the bases of the gate of the court, all the pegs of the tabernacle, and all the pegs around the court.
zh: 院子四周的柱座、院子門口的柱座、帳幕的一切釘子和院子四周的一切釘子。
